title: AI Data Analyst for Industry
mode: Self Learning + Execution Lab + Mentor Validations

programOverview.objective: Train engineers to convert business data into decision intelligence—cleaning, modeling, forecasting, and dashboarding with deployable reporting pipelines.
forWho: Junior data analysts and BI engineers
Business analysts upskilling for analytics roles
Developers moving into analytics or data engineering tasks
keyOutcomes: Build robust data ingestion and cleaning pipelines
Create feature-engineered datasets for modeling and forecasting
Deploy dashboards and scheduled reporting that inform business actions
Produce a deployment-ready capstone demonstrating measurable KPI improvements

responsibilities: Review dataset interpretation and business mapping
Validate model choices and evaluation metrics
Provide pipeline debugging and production-readiness guidance
Simulate stakeholder Q&A for final presentations

curriculum.title: Python for Business Analytics & Data Foundations
coreObjectives: Understand data lifecycle in business environments
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Insights must connect to measurable business impact.

curriculum.title: Data Cleaning & Transformation Engineering
coreObjectives: Handle missing, inconsistent, and noisy data
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Pipeline must be reusable and documented.

curriculum.title: KPI Architecture & Business Intelligence Mapping
coreObjectives: Map operational metrics to strategic KPIs
Understand revenue, efficiency, and risk indicators
practicalImplementation: Build KPI architecture for selected industry

curriculum.title: Dashboard Engineering & Executive Storytelling
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Dashboard must answer 3 core business questions clearly.

curriculum.title: Predictive Analytics for Business Forecasting
coreObjectives: Select evaluation metrics aligned to business needs
practicalImplementation: Evaluate using business metric (MAPE, F1, etc.)

curriculum.title: Data Automation & ETL Deployment
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Pipeline must run unattended for test cycles.

curriculum.title: Real-time Analytics & Dashboarding
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Pipeline must process events in <2 second latency.

curriculum.title: Advanced Forecasting & Time-Series Modeling
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Forecast must achieve <15% MAPE on test set.

curriculum.title: Advanced Analytics & Causal Inference
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Test design must control for confounders.

curriculum.title: Capstone Project & Production Deployment
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Project must demonstrate measurable KPI improvement.

capstone.objective: Deliver an end-to-end analytics solution converting raw business data into actionable decisions with measurable KPI improvements.
requirements: Clear business problem and KPI definition
Data pipeline (SQL + Python notebooks) and reproducible environment
Predictive or forecasting model with evaluation and baseline
Business impact memo and deployment notes
deliverables: GitHub repository with code, datasets (sample/anonymized), and deployment instructions
Business impact memo (1–2 pages) showing KPI delta and recommended actions
Mentor sign-off and stakeholder-ready slide deck

industryExposure.minimumIndustries: Students must cover at least 3 industries
datasetRequirements: Time-series with hourly/daily granularity for forecasting
Minimum two real or anonymized datasets per student/team
dashboardAndAutomationExpectations: Executive dashboard: top-line KPI, trend, and anomaly alerts
Drilldowns: cohort segmentation and funnel analysis
Scheduled automated reports (weekly/monthly) and exportable CSV outputs
evaluationCheckpoints: Data contract & quality checks approved by mentor
Model explainability notes (SHAP/LIME summaries) for stakeholders
Runbook for scheduled deliveries and data lineage
